title: Sahco Appoints Adenike Aboderin Managing Director
description: Following the tenure elapse of Mr Basil Agboarumi, Adenike Aboderin has been appointed as the Managing Director/CEO of Skyway Aviation Handling Company (SAHCO) PLC, effective February 1, 2024. With a
html:
Following the tenure elapse of Mr Basil Agboarumi, Adenike Aboderin has been appointed as the Managing Director/CEO of Skyway Aviation Handling Company (SAHCO) PLC, effective February 1, 2024.

With a background in finance, she brings extensive executive leadership experience from both the public and private sectors.

Aboderin served as Director of Finance and Accounts at the Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria until December 2023. Her career spans over 20 years in banking, including positions at Skye Bank Plc, Citibank Nigeria, and Premium Securities Limited.

She holds a Bachelor’s and a Master’s Degree in Finance and Banking from the University of Lagos, is a Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria, and is pursuing a Master’s in Sustainable Development from the University of Sussex.

Aboderin is recognized for her expertise in policy formulation, financial advisory, and has attended postgraduate courses at Harvard Business School and Lagos Business School.

Passionate about industrialization and job creation, she aims to contribute to Nigeria’s development. SAHCO, the company she now leads, specializes in aviation ground handling services.
